description: daysOfWeek filtering must read millisecond epoch values as milliseconds. 345600000 ms = Mon Jan 5 1970 UTC (day 1); if misread as seconds it becomes Sun Dec 14 1980 (day 0), so daysOfWeek [1] would reject index 0 and fail loudly. Daily ms starts over count 7 are 345600000 + index*86400000; only index 0 is Monday in the correct UTC calendar.
